project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Resolve an effective owner scope for host-root CLI recovery, add owner switching, Root recovery profile, and prevent user:unknown sessions.

userStories.title: Add owner discovery and Root recovery owner
userStories.description: As a host-root CLI operator, I want the CLI to discover Web users or fall back to Root recovery so sessions always have a real owner scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement owner discovery from rooms, sessions, session_navigation, custom agents, and Better Auth data where available
Define a stable Root recovery owner scope that is not user:unknown and has no email requirement
Ensure the selected or fallback owner has a Personal Chat/default room available
Focused tests cover no owners, one owner, and multiple owners
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 13c0b33. Implemented LocalCliSessionSource owner discovery and active owner resolution from explicit --owner-scope, session store, Pibo data rooms/session_navigation/sessions/event_log actor owner scopes, and custom-agent owner hints passed by the default CLI source context. Added stable Root recovery owner local:root with label Root recovery and no email requirement. listRooms/getStatus/createSession now ensure or expose a selected-owner Personal Chat/default room; createSession without owner no longer silently writes user:unknown and uses the resolved owner/default room. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs' passed 25/25 focused tests (real source/unit path, no PTY required for this source-contract story). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run; it failed in unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune test that also fails standalone, while this story's focused tests passed.

userStories.title: Implement owner picker and active owner state
userStories.description: As a recovery operator, I want to choose the effective user/profile before rooms and sessions are shown.
acceptanceCriteria: Startup uses --owner-scope when provided and otherwise resolves or prompts for an owner before room navigation
Multiple owners show an Ink owner picker with keyboard navigation
Header and /status include active owner label and scope
pibo debug pty scenario asserts owner picker appears with multiple owners
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in b1399a6. Implemented startup active-owner state for the Ink CLI with a keyboard owner picker when multiple owners are discovered, explicit --owner-scope skip behavior, mutable CliSessionSource.setActiveOwner(), and header/status propagation through the selected owner label/scope. The fake and local sources now support switching the effective owner; selection closes any open handle before room navigation. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 28/28 focused tests (real source/unit path plus Ink render/reducer tests). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-owner-room && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-owner-room --timeout-ms 45000 --idle-timeout-ms 12000 --cols 100 --rows 28 --wait-for "Select effective owner" --expect "Web user alpha" --expect "Web user beta" --press Down --press Enter --wait-for "Select room for Web user beta" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha,user:beta node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions' passed (real PTY path with deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider); scripted assertions waited for the owner picker, asserted Web user alpha and Web user beta, selected beta with Down/Enter, then continued to room/session creation. Raw PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/raw.ansi.log. Clean PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/clean.txt. Observed clean output shows "Select effective owner", selected "Web user beta (user:beta)" in the header, and continued without user:unknown. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run; 489/490 tests passed and the only failure remained the pre-existing unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion.

userStories.title: Add /owner or /profile switch flow
userStories.description: As a CLI operator, I want to switch the effective owner during a recovery session so I can inspect another user's rooms and sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add /owner or /profile command to open the owner picker
Switching owners closes or clears the active session unless it belongs to the new owner
Rooms, sessions, agents, and slash actions reload for the selected owner
Sending to a session owned by another owner is rejected with a clear error
pibo debug pty scenario switches owner and asserts room list changes
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Prevent and repair user:unknown CLI sessions
userStories.description: As an admin, I want diagnostics and repair for legacy user:unknown sessions so they can be reassigned safely and no new ones are created accidentally.
acceptanceCriteria: New CLI session creation, user message ingest, assistant event ingest, and navigation writes never silently use user:unknown
Legacy user:unknown sessions are excluded from default new-write flows unless explicitly selected or repaired
Provide a CLI diagnostic or repair path to reassign legacy CLI sessions to a selected owner
Tests cover sessions.owner_scope and session_navigation.owner_scope updates
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify selected Web owner sessions appear in Web UI
userStories.description: As a Web user, I want sessions created through host-root CLI impersonation to appear in my Web Personal Chat or selected room.
acceptanceCriteria: pibo debug pty creates a session as a selected Web owner in Personal Chat and sends a message through the real router/source path
Store/API/Web navigation check confirms the created session is visible for that owner and room
The session URL /rooms/<roomId>/sessions/<sessionId> opens or is returned for manual verification
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
